text: The sterile quietness of the empty meeting room fills me with a sense of anticipation, as if something meaningful could be decided here. Yet, moving into the exhibition, I feel curiosity ignite. The wall’s bold colors and thoughtful words about research and human connection invite reflection. Here, I feel the thrill of questions—what does it mean to observe, to connect, to innovate? My presence becomes an inquiry, the boundaries between ordinary life and philosophical wonder suddenly blurred.
